stories.title: This Roboticist-Turned-Teacher Built a Life-Size Replica of ENIAC
stories.summary: Tom Burick has always considered himself a builder. Over the years he’s designed robots, constructed a vintage teardrop trailer , and most recently, led a group of students in building a full-scale replica of a pivotal 1940s computer. Burick is a technology instructor at PS Academy in Gilbert, Ariz.

stories.title: Look back on 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at the Robotics Summit
stories.summary: At the summit, Gavin Kenneally, CEO and co-founder of Ghost Robotics, will share lessons from 10 years of deploying quadruped robots. The post Look back on 10 years of legged robots with Ghost Robotics at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report .

stories.title: Feel like TurtleBot4_Navigation is a "House of Cards" for my robot
stories.summary: My Raspberry Pi 5 powered TurtleBot4 (clone) TB5-WaLI has been “alive” for 11108 hours since January 9, 2025. stories.title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
stories.summary: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. stories.title: AGI Is Not Multimodal
